content.en:
"What kind of big opportunity is it, if it is suitable, I am naturally willing to cooperate!"

Ye Tian said.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon smiled and immediately said, "That's great, if we have your help, we will have a higher success rate in obtaining this great opportunity!"

Immediately, he began to tell the story of this great opportunity.

"Ye Tian, in a certain extra-dimensional territory over here, there is a hidden inheritance of a certain big man. A long time ago, in order to find this inheritance, many forces destroyed many extradimensional territories here, but none of them could find it. However, I had a clue and was able to obtain the key item of the inheritance. Although that key item was snatched away by a guy from the Fourth Realm, that guy also sealed me. However, the other party still obtained the inheritance of the big man. "

Tricky Wood Red Dragon said.

Immediately, he said: "There is more than one key item, I have another one, for me, it is not difficult to find the place of inheritance, it is really difficult how to obtain the inheritance, if I rely on myself, I am afraid it will be difficult to succeed, but with your joining, it is very hopeful." "

Ye Tian interrupted: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, what is the origin of that inheritance?"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon no longer concealed it, and revealed, "That inheritance is a Sixth Realm inheritance!"

"What, the Sixth Realm !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The transcendent realm of the sixth realm, what kind of concept is that, the strongest existence he has ever seen is the fourth realm, there is no fifth realm on the other side of the five thousand realms, and the existence of the fifth realm is definitely an extremely terrifying existence.

As for the Sixth Realm, I am afraid that a single thought can destroy the 5,000 Territory, or turn the 2,000 extradimensional Territories on the 6,000 Outer Dimension Territory into nothingness.

Just when Ye Tian was shocked, Weimu Chilong said again: "Don't be too shocked, although the sixth realm is rare, it will not be too rare. It's just that the normal sixth realm will not give us an inheritance, but the existence of the sixth realm has fallen, and many places have been left behind before the fall, and this is one of the places of inheritance, and there are very few known existences, and it is also the easiest inheritance to obtain~. "

"The inheritance of the normal sixth realm does not necessarily have any good things, but this sixth realm is different, the other party claims that the sixth realm can be called an invincible existence, and the innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure, innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, and various rare treasures do not know how many, just get a little thing, it is enough for us to rise. The key is that there is also a thing against the sky on the body of that Sixth Realm - the Wumu True Liquid, and the usefulness of the Wumu True Liquid is that it can reshape the bloodline and the extradimensional realm in the body. I am following the path of the extradimensional bloodline of the extradimensional creatures, but my superdimensional bloodline has become incomplete due to an accident, and it is difficult to break through to the fourth realm. If I get a drop of Wumu True Liquid, I can break through to the fourth realm, and even hope for the fifth realm in the future!"

Wumu real liquid?

Ye Tian was shocked, there was still this kind of treasure.

If the bloodline is imperfect, or the extradimensional realm in the body is imperfect, it is impossible to break through to the fourth realm.

It's like the transcendent realm in the body of the lord of the moon realm has been destroyed, even if he recovers with the multi-dimensional healing essence of the three realms, the foundation is still damaged, and the superdimensional realm in the body is no longer perfect, and there is no hope for the fourth realm in the future.

However, if you obtain the true liquid of the black mother, then you can completely restore the extradimensional realm in your body, and you have the potential to impact the fourth realm in the future.

For those in the third realm who had no hope of breaking through to the fourth realm, the value of a drop of Wumu True Liquid was enough to reverse their fate!

But Ye Tian can also imagine that the value of the Wumu True Liquid is not at all imaginable by the third realm, and the fourth realm is not qualified to obtain the Wumu True Liquid, otherwise, with the background of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, even if he is expelled from the clan, he still has a strong background, and even he is not qualified to obtain the Wumu True Liquid, so it can be seen that even with the Fifth Realm as a backer, it is difficult to obtain the Wumu True Liquid!

Maybe even the black mother true liquid is only in the hands of that sixth realm.

"It's no wonder that the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, as the ultimate existence of the third realm, ran to this place and was sealed by the other fourth realms!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he asked again, "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, if we find that inheritance place, will there be a fourth or even fifth realm coming over?"

"Probably not!" Tricky Wood Red Dragon shook his head, "It's been too long, who will come here." Besides, it is not easy for the Fifth Realm to come here, it will be strictly restricted, so don't worry. "

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, then let's go find that inheritance place now!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

"Good!"

Gradually, the mirror emitted a ray of light that faintly pointed to an area.

"Let's go, let's follow the light!"

The body of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon moved, and shuttled past.

Ye Tian also followed, and soon they crossed one territory after another.

"This place of heritage can change at any time, and if you don't have a guide to key items, you can't find it. The strange red dragon explained that this was why he needed to find the place of inheritance again.

After a while, they came to the territory of 6611.

"It's in this territory!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon affirmed.

After a while, he used the key item in his hand to completely lock on to the location of the inheritance.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, there's nothing here?" Ye Tian frowned, he even used his copying talent, but he didn't find anything.

This is an ordinary area of the Void of Death!

"That place of inheritance is naturally not easy to find, and if it was easy to see, (Hao Li's) would have been discovered a long time ago. Don't observe it by normal means, that's useless. "

"According to my guess, this inheritance land should be hidden in some dimension!"

"The extra-dimensional territory where we are located is the unity of multi-dimensional space, but there are powerful beings who can dimensionalize the multidimensional space layer by layer, and stuff some items into a certain layer of dimensionality, which cannot be seen in the outside world, and the dimensions must be parsed layer by layer. "

"It's just that the cost of dissecting the dimensions layer by layer is too great, and if the scope covers a superdimensional realm, the fifth realm can't do it. But we have already locked down the specific location, and with my strength, I can also parse the dimensions of this small area layer by layer. "

After saying that, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon took out another item.

This item is a quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure, but it is a little mutilated, but it still contains terrifying power.
